feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business rule: get completed months/days of absences
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to get  the calulation of the full calendar months covered during the absences (so eclude partial months). Number of months or days, no matters.

 I used the function "Get Completed Months Of Time Types In Period()", but it provides only full month for a given Time type. 

we can have two or three unpaid absences that cover the entire month, and in this case the function doesn't work.  

We would like to be able to cumulate several absences to get completed months in a period. 

Any idea how I can that? I'm pretty new on Employee Central Time.

So your help would be really appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Regards, 

Sevda

entry.title: Onboarding: Multiple email templates in which the logo would be different?
entry.content:
Hello Community

I need an answer to the following question: Is it possible to have multiple email templates in which the logo would be different?

Best regarda, Ali

@Gopinath @CurtisWeldon @piyushkumarag @smitajalit @chandan_kumar09

entry.title: SF EC - Email Information portlet query
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

Can we update an email in 'Email Information portlet' without specifying that email as primary. 

For example, consider a user by name' Rajesh Kumar' and User have only one email which is his personal email i.e.., 'abc@gmail.com'. Can we update this email without specifying it as primary email in SuccessFactors -> Email Information Portlet.

 

Is this a standard system behavior as I am unable to see any business rule associated with this portlet due to which it is exhibiting this behavior.

entry.title: Custom Field from Object Position to Succession Org Chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I hope that you are doing well. 
I need your expertise to enable custom field of Object-Position to Succession Org Chart.
All 15 custom fields have been used in Employee Profile. Kindly assist on how to map custom field from Position to Succession Org Chart.

 

Thanks and Regards,
Rishabh Gupta

entry.title: Rehire a employee who is on Global Assignment in the host country
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a scenario in our company where we are localizing an employee who is on global assignment. We are using SF as source and data is replicated back to SAP HCM system where we have Payroll .  We have a requirement that we want localized SAP ID ( PERNR) to be same as SAP Global Assignment ID in other words Employment id in Host Country ( PERNR) . Example below: 

 

Friedrich Felix is a German employee who was working from 2023-01-01 till 2023-07-31 in German company A with SAP PERNR as "100". . From 2023-08-01 he came to work in USA in a global assignment for 2 months i.e. till 2023-09-30 as SAP PERNR '101'.  Friedrich Felix and USA company planned to localize him in the USA ( rehire in US with end of German employment)  after his global assignment with the same user id as while he was in USA assignment SAP ID 101'. 

 

We do not want to hire Friedrich Felix  as a “new hire/new employment” in USA, rather would like to continue the global assignment user id to re-hire him. Please advise.

 

The reason for us to rehire with same user id is to have the payroll or any other 3rd party downstream system to use the same id for legal purposes.

 

Note: we are using SAP HCM to replication the USA employment and executing payroll for USA, we need to have one user so the payroll taxes and other legal payroll requirements are met.

 

Thanks

Senthil Bala

entry.title: Hide Compensation Information for Partners
entry.content: I want to hide the compensation information for a specific employee group from the RBPs of all HR Teams with the exception of a specific Group that manages the compensation data.

entry.title: Configuration transfer methods/tools
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking to gather insights oncent configuration transport tools/methods including:

1.  SuccessFactors Configuration Transport Centre (SCTC)

2. Instance sync tools

3. Export and import tools (XML/MDF...)

4. Manual configuration of changes in each instance

Please let me know if you have used any and what your personal views are; any pain points, which you prefer to use, recommendations etc.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Data Retention Management of Offboarded Employees
entry.content:
Hello, Community -
I would like to ask after you offboard your employee, how do you/other companies handle the list of former employees after the GDPR period and manage their alumni? Can we keep only selected fields?
Regards,
Adi
 
SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core

entry.title: SF Employee Central Contingent Worker End Date error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using Contingent Worker functionality in EC. We have a contingent worker record with work order end date of March 8th, 2024. On top of this record we have rehired them as full time employee with effective date of March 17th, 2024. Now when we try to update the work order end date from March 8th to March 15th, we are getting an error - Employment Information : Before rehiring an employee, you must dissociate existing employment information.

We have tried updating the work order end date via UI and Imports but getting the same error.

We tried the same scenario in another instance and its working properly there.

Any inputs/insights are appreciated!

entry.title: Rotational Week off
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Right now only a particular day week off is available in the timesheet in SuccessFactors. But there are employees who can take 1week off or 2 week off in a week whenever they want to.

For e.g. one employee is having week off on Monday, but he decided to work on Monday & take week off on Tuesday. Then in that case he is having rotational week off as work schedule. But we are not having the option of rotational week off in time sheet. Is it possible to configure this so that employee can take weekly off whenever they want to. We need to create a roster that allows managers to have rotating weekly offs for their teams. This scenario is very common in all retail/call center companies.

entry.title: While importing termination details the supervisor does not get updated in system
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

In SuccessFactors once manager will get terminated from the system, the Reportees under him will get directly assigned to the next level manager if manager is choosing transfer direct Reportees.

While importing termination details the supervisor does not get updated in system.

Can we check the feasibility of the same ,so by importing termination details of supervisor the reportees under him will get directly assigned to the next level manager.

entry.title: Employee status for the notice period employees should get changed to Serving notice period
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

In system if employee is in his notice period , until his last working day his/her employee status shows "Active".

So those are serving notice period, for them the employee status should get changed to "Serving notice period" instead of  "Active" in job information automatically. 


Thank you.

entry.title: Employee unable to withdraw resignation after final approval from approvers
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Can employee withdraw resignation after final approval of the workflow is done in SuccessFactors?

For example- Employee initiated resignation. It got approved by the approvers. Then employee wants to withdraw resignation after final approval. But he is unable to do so, only Admin can do it.

entry.title: Can we attach separate content for contributors for Exit mail in Manage Email configuration
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Can we attach separate content for contributors for Exit mail in Manage Email configuration.

For example- When employee is initiating resignation- The mail is triggering to HR, Manager & all the No Dues clearance Spocs. But the content is same because we have kept them as a contributors so even if there is no approval the mail will trigger to all the contributors. As a system standard now we only can send one content to all the Contributors. Is there any feasibility of sharing different male to different contributors of the work flow.

entry.title: Leave accrual for employee who initiated Resignation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

If an employee is getting terminated/ separated from system in mid of the month, then only till that month leave should get encashed. Annual leave is getting accrued 15 days at a bulk in the first month of the year. So while employee is initiating his resignation , the same balance is getting shown in employee profile. Is it possible to show the balance on the basis of the month when he will resign, because his balance is getting accrued in the first month of the year itself.

For example- If employee is initiating his resignation on October, then till October whatever will be the leave balance for annual leave(9 days) only that will get shown in employee profile in termination page, not 15 days.

entry.title: No dues alert not triggering
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

There are few Contributors for No dues workflow. When the separation of the employee will get initiated, No dues alert will get trigger to the Contributors & in Home Page they will be able to view the Alert to initiate the No dues for the particular employees.

We have tried to achieve the same through Alert but no alert is getting triggered. Is there any feasibility on the same?

entry.title: Fiscal Year date format change in Income tax portlet
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my Customer has this following ask.

Can we change the date format of fiscal year to 2023-2024, 2022-2023, 2020-2021 instead of 2021,2022, 2023.

Please refer to the screenshot.

Thanks.

entry.title: Story report issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

we meet an issue at existing Story reports for few days: 

We can run story report, but in each component (table) we cant´t see data but only an error

"An error occurred while fetching the list of members."

Do you know what can be a root of this issue a and how to solve it?

Thanks, Míša

entry.title: Is there a guideline from SAP for a uniform/standard naming convention for SAP SuccessFactors?
entry.content:
Hello community ,

Is there a (standard) guideline from SAP on how to best manage naming conventions for SAP SuccessFactors?
I mean for example: modules, objects, fields, rules, roles, groups, etc.?

If not, do you have an example or a hint on how best to proceed here?

Best regards, Ali

@S_Strangfeld  
@StephanieBM01 
@gobind

entry.title: EC UI is displaying the Option ID from a picklist instead of the Label
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In our EC Address portlet, we have a field for 'County'. The County field is linked to a picklist called 'GBR_COUNTY'.  

One of our users can see the Option ID on employees' Address UI instead of the label.

For example, we have a county with the Label 'Greater London' and the Option ID for that is '1060.

Our user is seeing '1060' in the county field on employees' Address UI's.

I have checked Manage Business Configuration and the field is linked to the correct picklist.

I found the SAP KBA below, but the causes of the issue do not apply to us, because we have not migrated or changed the picklist.  

2705217 - Field displaying numerical IDs instead of Picklist labels - Employee Central (sap.com) 

The Label and Option ID in our picklist are shown below:

Only one user has reported this issue.

They have sent us screenshots of the Option ID on the UI. However, when we proxy in as the user, we see the correct label and not the Option ID.

Has anyone experienced this issue? Do you know what could be causing the display of the picklist Option ID instead of the Label (and only for some users)?

Thank you for any advice, much appreciated.

Kind regards
